questionHtml: Formulate an equation for the reaction of one mole of phosphoric acid with one mole of sodium hydroxide.
markschemeHtml:
H3PO4 (aq) + NaOH (aq) → NaH2PO4 (aq) + H2O (l) ✔


Accept net ionic equation.

meta.title: Formulate an equation for the reaction of one mole of phosphoric acid with one mole of sodium hydroxide.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?
Reactivity 3.1.7—Acids react with bases in neutralization reactions. Formulate equations for the reactions between acids and metal oxides, metal hydroxides, hydrogencarbonates and carbonates.
